mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_file ( file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, upload_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{uploadBy}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, file_name AS fileName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, file_type AS fileType, upload_by AS uploadBy, create_time AS createTime FROM sys_file WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT f.id, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_path AS filePath, f.file_size AS fileSize, f.file_type AS fileType, f.upload_by AS uploadBy, u.name AS uploadByName, f.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_file f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.upload_by = u.id WHERE f.id = #{id}

SELECT f.id, f.file_name AS fileName, f.file_path AS filePath, f.file_size AS fileSize, f.file_type AS fileType, f.upload_by AS uploadBy, u.name AS uploadByName, f.create_time AS createTime FROM sys_file f LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON f.upload_by = u.id WHERE f.upload_by = #{uploadBy} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
